summary: Russian forces in the Sumy region destroyed a Ukrainian 2S22 "Bogdan" self-propelled artillery system with FPV drone strikes from the "KVN" unit of the "Sever" assault group. Ukrainian forces intercepted a Ukrainian Air Force "Hornet" fixed-wing UAV using the "Yolka" anti-drone system, causing its warhead to detonate, while the "Elka" system performed a kinetic interception on another fixed-wing UAV, critically damaging its airframe. The Rubicon Center reported destroying 90 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and personnel on April 9, 2026, and 173 on April 8, 2026, in operations across Donbas, Belgorod, and Krasny Liman directions. Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to kill Russian soldiers attempting assaults on motorcycles and to eliminate a Russian soldier who feigned surrender before fleeing. The Ukrainian 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV drone attack in the Kostiantynivka direction, with soldiers using drone detectors to anticipate the strike.
